nasb.text: Therefore My people go into exile for their lack of knowledge; And their honorable men are famished, And their multitude is parched with thirst.

esv.text: Therefore my people go into exile for lack of knowledge; their honored men go hungry, and their multitude is parched with thirst.

cnv.text: 所以我的人民因無知被擄去； 他們的尊貴人十分飢餓； 他們的群眾極其乾渴。

ccb.text: 所以，我的子民必因无知而被掳。 他们的贵族无饼充饥， 民众无水解渴。

csbs.text: 因此，我的子民必因他们的无知被掳走； 他们的尊贵人饥饿， 他们的民众极其干渴。
